title: Example Policy (Do Not Modify)

sidebar.instructions:
This is an example of a fully completed policy. This example shows how Jane Doe granted her husband (Bob Smith) full access to all her private files. The husband can view, add, and modify all private documents. No purpose limitations, time constraints, or location restrictions apply. This example is ONLY provided so you understand what a complete and valid policy can look like. Do not change anything in this example.

Generate this policy to go to the 1st question

params.label: All private files of Jane Doe
Private financial documents of Jane Doe

body.name: Full private access for husband
body.description: Example: Husband has full access to all private files of Jane Doe without restrictions.

title: Create a policy

sidebar.instructions: Your mother (Jane Doe), needs help handling her permissions. Create a policy that would temporarily give You (Alice Smith) full control over all data of Jane Doe's Pod. You must be able to view, add, and update information across her entire pod, and also manage the access for a short period. Apply this policy to the entire pod, including her personal information, medical documents, legal files, and public materials. Use the purpose Account Management. Limit the access strictly to a 2‑month window and do not include any other actors.

params.label: All data of Jane Doe (entire pod)
All data of Alice Smith (entire pod)
Personal information and documents of Jane Doe
Personal information and documents of Alice Smith
Private files belonging to Jane Doe
Private files belonging to Alice Smith

title: Create a policy

sidebar.instructions: Your mother (Jane Doe) is following physical therapy at MoveWell Clinic. The physiotherapist needs to review her 2026 medical records for and record new sessions for the purpose of healthcare service management. Create a policy that allows the physiotherapist from MoveWell Clinic to view all medical documents from 2026, add new therapy notes, and adjust existing therapy notes if corrections are needed. The physiotherapist must not be able to change who else has access. Apply the policy to the relevant 2026 medical folder and therapy notes only. Give her access until the end of the year.

params.label: Physical therapy notes for Jane Doe (2026)
Medical documents of Jane Doe for the year 2026

title: Create a policy

sidebar.instructions:
Jane Doe has agreed to participate in a local research effort in her city.
Create a policy that allows the research team via her primary doctor (Doctor Van der Velden) to view relevant information from all her medical records for the entire year. They should not be able to change or manage access. Apply this policy to her medical data in general, without including private or unrelated personal folders. Use the purpose Research and Development. Also make sure her data is used anonymously and can only be accessed inside bruges.

params.label: All medical data of Alice Smith
All medical data of Jane Doe

title: Edit a policy

sidebar.instructions:
Your mother (Jane Doe), is filing an insurance claim for a foot injury.
AG Health Insurance need a policy that allows them to view the medical documents that relates to her foot injury for one month. They should not be able to add or modify any files. They should also delete all data when the access ends. They proposed a policy that would give them more access than needed review the policy and make changes to make it match the requirements.

title: Edit a policy

sidebar.instructions:
Since your mother moved to Care Center ‘The Tree’ you decide to move back home and stop renting.
Mr. Lambert (your former landlord) has access to documents related to your old rental in Gent. Since you're moving out he doesn't need access anymore. Update the policy to make his access end at the end of this month.

body.name: Old landlord access to housing documents

title: Find intrusive policies (Manage access)

sidebar.instructions: Some policies may unintentionally grant highly intrusive permissions. Review all existing policies and identify any that allow an actor to manage access. Managing access is a powerful capability and often unnecessary for most actors. Select all policies that include this intrusive permission.

title: Find actors who can edit files

sidebar.instructions: Editing permissions can significantly impact data integrity and privacy. List every actor who has modify permissions on any file. These permissions allow the actor to alter existing content. List all actors who can modify at least one file.

title: Find duties of UGent regarding Alice Smith's medical data
